name: Work
purpose: What is planned and in what order. Hierarchical decomposition — roadmap → milestone → epic → story → task. Each feature/epic owns its own scope, acceptance criteria, and scoped finding registry.
ownership_principle: A task belongs to a story, a story to an epic, an epic to a milestone. Findings discovered while working on a story live in that story's feature node, not in the global tracker. Global task lists are materialized views, not the authoritative store.

target_blocks.name: features.json
target_blocks.notes: seed: one feature per epic, with embedded stories and tasks; hand-enactment of the nested structure until FGAP-001 lands

target_blocks.name: features/
target_blocks.notes: target: once FGAP-001 lands, each feature becomes features/{id}.json and stories/tasks become subfiles
